Product Description: Originating from Asia, garlic is one of the oldest cultivated plants known to man.

overall_summary: Positioned as a premium organic spice product with strong health and dietary certifications (USDA Organic, Gluten-Free, Non-GMO, Vegan). The 16 oz (1 lb) plastic bag packaging is standard for bulk spices, targeting health-conscious consumers and those following specialized diets. While the product lacks explicit luxury branding, its organic and gluten-free certifications justify a mid-to-high price point compared to conventional garlic powders. The versatile use cases (cooking, seasoning) and dietary inclusivity (vegan, kosher) expand its market appeal beyond basic culinary applications.
